final:
module mux4to1 (
    input wire [3:0] obf_in, // 4 inputs
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2-bit select signal
    output wire out // output
);
    assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? obf_in[0] :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? obf_in[1] :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? obf_in[2] :
                 obf_in[3]; // default case selects the last input
endmodule
